summary: Trust Integrity Layer Testing Complete. 11/11 backend tests passed, frontend verification badges working. All 12 features verified: self-reaction prevention (403), duplicate detection (409), rate limit check, verification upgrades, downgrade prevention, trust multipliers, verification_level in feed API, frontend badges (BadgeCheck green, Building2 amber), integrity-stats and flags endpoints, cross-user reactions, scheduler at 04:00 UTC.
critical_code_review_comments: Anti-spam checks properly integrated: check_rate_limit, check_duplicate, check_self_reaction all imported in actions.py
Verification multipliers correctly applied: self_reported=1x, community_verified=2x, org_verified=3x
Trust signal recalculated on every reaction using recalc_trust_signal() with verification multiplier
Downgrade prevention works: attempting to set lower verification level returns 400 with clear message
Frontend disables reaction buttons for own actions (correct UX for self-reaction prevention)
Verification badges use correct icons: BadgeCheck (green #10b981) for community_verified, Building2 (amber #f59e0b) for org_verified
Scheduler properly configured with both decays: regular at 03:00 UTC, trust integrity at 04:00 UTC
seed_data_creation: Multiple test actions created during testing: RateLimitTest-*, VerifyTest-* (timestamped to avoid duplicates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Integrity Layer fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/actions/{id}/react (403 for self-reaction), POST /api/actions/post (409 for duplicates, 429 for rate limit), POST /api/trust/verify/{id} (upgrade only), GET /api/trust/integrity-stats, GET /api/trust/flags. Frontend shows verification badges with correct colors. Reaction buttons disabled for own actions. Scheduler runs trust decay at 04:00 UTC daily.

features_verified.1_self_reaction_prevention: PASS - POST /api/actions/{own_id}/react returns 403 'Cannot react to your own action'
features_verified.2_duplicate_detection: PASS - POST /api/actions/post with same title+desc within 24h returns 409
features_verified.3_rate_limit_check: PASS - Endpoint accepts valid posts (200/201) or blocks with 429 when limit exceeded
features_verified.4_verification_upgrade: PASS - POST /api/trust/verify/{id} upgrades to community_verified (2x) or org_verified (3x)
features_verified.5_downgrade_prevention: PASS - Cannot downgrade from community_verified to self_reported (400)
features_verified.7_feed_includes_verification_level: PASS - All feed actions include verification_level and verification_multiplier fields
features_verified.8_frontend_verification_badges: PASS - BadgeCheck (green) shown for community_verified, Building2 (amber) for org_verified
features_verified.9_integrity_stats_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/trust/integrity-stats returns total_actions, self_reported, community_verified, org_verified, flags
features_verified.10_flags_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/trust/flags returns flags list and total count
features_verified.11_cross_user_reaction: PASS - User B can react to User A's actions, trust updates correctly
features_verified.12_scheduler_configured: PASS - Trust integrity decay scheduled at 04:00 UTC daily (verified in scheduler.py)
